params.name: Thundos' Sculpture
params.description: Upon learning of Thundos' fall, Earth's Will had a batch of statues crafted in the likeness of its head. One purpose was to commemorate the historic moment of triumph over a formidable foe, and the other was to bestow them upon those exceptional Travelers, allowing them to share in the Joy of victory!
